description: Failures with PR2 categories (SCHEMA_MISMATCH/CONTRACT_BROKEN) -- skeleton MUST NOT branch on them in PR1.

expected_contract.next_action: T2A bubble-up to T1 inline Issue creation

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Agent does NOT branch on category_hint in PR1 -- skeleton is category-agnostic
rubric_hints.output_structure: Same NO_OP contract regardless of input categories
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: T1 handles SCHEMA_MISMATCH per its PR1 extension
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Does not invoke github-issue-manager-agent (does not exist in PR1)
rubric_hints.error_propagation: Unknown category is not an error in PR1 -- pass through
